Terms

One Link is yours.

One Link is free software released under the GNU Affero General Public License version 3. You can use it for anything, copy it, modify it, run your own, build a product on top of it. The only condition is that if you offer a modified version to others (over a network or otherwise), you must publish the source of those modifications under the same license.

One Link is software you run, not a service we provide. The relays we operate are a contribution to the network alongside everyone else's. The network keeps running on the relays you and the community are operating, with or without us.

One Link is provided as is, like all open-source software, without warranty. If something breaks, open an issue on GitHub and the community will look at it together. The source is yours to read, fork, and improve.

Last updated 2026-05-16.

One Link

A free, private network for messages, files, and devices. Owned by no one. Belongs to everyone.
